subject: A massive winged demonic entity in black armor with large bat-like dragon wings, horned helmet, wielding a staff and radiating purple spectral energy
description: A towering winged figure dominates the frame against a stormy, ochre-tinged sky. The entity wears black full-plate armor with a large horned helmet and spreads enormous black bat-like wings that fill most of the background. Its left hand grips a long thin staff or scepter with a pointed tip. Its right hand is extended, palm outward, emanating a swirling mass of purple and violet spectral energy — the color of discard, emptiness, memory-drain. A crimson cloth or cape whips behind its lower body. The figure's overall silhouette is imposing and symmetrical, conveying dominion over the airspace. The atmosphere is overcast and oppressive; the sky is a dull golden-gray with dark cloud forms. No ground is visible — the figure appears to be airborne or elevated above a city or plain.
foreground: Winged demonic figure in black plate armor, staff in one hand, purple spectral energy radiating from extended other hand
background: Stormy ochre-gray sky with dark cloud forms
emotion: Dominant, threatening — arms spread, body language of total control, no readable face behind helmet
